raw_consumer_statement: I noticed a charge of {$86.00} from the XXXX XXXX XXXX " XXXX XXXX '' on Wednesday XX/XX/year>. I have not been to that establishment in over three months so it's impossible for this charge to have occurred. I called them the same day and asked for more information regarding this charge because I suspected fraud. They told me there was a glitch in their billing system and several other people had been impacted by this glitch. I disputed the charge with AMEX. AMEX reached out to XXXX XXXX who sent them over a receipt of the transaction so they denied my dispute. However, since there was a glitch in their billing system, and I had already visited this location in the past, they would no doubt have my information handy and can easily produce a receipt. You can check my phone information, or other data, I was nowhere near that establishment at the time the transaction occurred.
